title: Print Footer
text: Print Footer A Print Footer is a Frame in a Form or Report component that is used to print information at the bottom of each printed page. There can be multiple Print Footers in a component. Characteristics Characteristics Icon: Object type code: pfo Main Development Object? No Part of: Component Contains: Property , Code Container , Non-Database Entity , Area Generalization: Frame Specializations: Compilation Output: — URI format: cpt: ComponentName /pfo: PrintFooterId Specialization Print Footer specializes Frame in the following ways: Its can only have a Form or Report component as parent object. It has the fixed name TRAILER.USYS . It cannot contain database entities. It can have a code container with a getFocus trigger. Properties Object properties: Name Type Location Presentation properties: Left (xpos) Top (ypos) Width (xsize) Height (ysize) Border Index Color Printing properties: Do not print empty occurrence Triggers trigger getFocus (Frame) Related Links Area Frames for Printing In reports, area frames can be used to add and protect text as part of an entity in Report components.
